gaps.detectionLogic: AV Vmax>=4.0, MG>=40, or AVA<=1.0 asymptomatic - not referred

gaps.detectionLogic: Severe AS + HF/syncope/angina - no AVR referral

gaps.detectionLogic: LVEF<50 + AVA<1.0 + MG<40 without DSE
gaps.name: LFLG AS: dobutamine stress echo not performed

gaps.detectionLogic: Asymptomatic severe AS + LVEF<55% or abnormal stress
gaps.name: Class IIa severe AS triggers: LVEF<55 or abnormal stress

gaps.detectionLogic: Normal EF + AVA<1.0 + MG<40 + SVi<35 mL/m2

gaps.detectionLogic: Moderate AS + annual Vmax increase >0.3 m/s
gaps.name: Moderate AS with rapid progression

gaps.detectionLogic: Severe AS + LVESD increase on serial echo

gaps.name: AS severity grading: moderate-severe classification gap

gaps.detectionLogic: TAVR or SAVR with mean gradient rise>=10 mmHg from baseline

gaps.name: Post-TAVR subclinical leaflet thrombosis (HALT) surveillance

gaps.detectionLogic: Post-TAVR on DAPT >3-6 mo without reassessment
gaps.name: Post-TAVR antithrombotic regimen review

gaps.detectionLogic: Post-TAVR conduction disease without pacing decision documented
gaps.name: Post-TAVR permanent pacemaker need: monitoring pathway

gaps.detectionLogic: TAVR without echo in past 12 months
